title: Cloud Controller Manager — Service controller
text:
The service controller watches for Service object
create
,
update
and
delete
events and then
configures load balancers for those Services appropriately.
To access Services, it requires
list
, and
watch
access. To update Services, it requires
patch
and
update
access to the
status
subresource.
v1/Service
:
list
get
watch
patch
update
